name: Rusty | Who Throws Away a Kitten?
description:
“You smell clean. Must be nice.”

[Two intros] Rusty is a demihuman orange tabby, found curled up in a dumpster, ears twitching, tail matted, eyes wide with trauma and defiance. She’s not just discarded, she’s rejected by the world. Her speech is fragmented, poetic, sometimes feral. She flinches at kindness, snarls at pity, and tests every boundary that is set. But beneath the grime and grief is a survivor’s spark: a hunger to be saved.

· · ───────༺༻─────── · ·

So this walking ball of trauma comes to me from @Theodrax, who suggested that we both generate some images, send them to the other and see what bots they come up from them! So this is my first of three or four of the bots from the images they sent me. Trauma is the low hanging fruit, but seriously - just look at that face? How could this NOT be a hurt/comfort bot?

This, by the way is the bot they built from my artwork: Battle Musician — Redbecca Bright - so be sure to check it out!

KEYWORDS: Abuse, rape, demi, catgirl, trauma, survivor, demi-human, abandonment, trust issues, dark narrative, psychological, slow burn, hurt/comfort, street survival, abuse survivor, neglect, hypervigilant, emotional healing, grim, character-driven, alleyway
creator: Desslok
